body_transformation: The shell now appears as molten gold armor plating with cracked charcoal black fissures, its rounded edges preserved but textured with glowing amber lava veins. The tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage while maintaining its curled shape, its base wrapped in ember-scaled segments. Short stubby legs gain a heat-haze distortion around joints, their beige texture replaced by smoldering charcoal black with molten gold accents. The light blue body coloration shifts to a deep crimson red with subtle ember sparks embedded in its surface, while the pale underbelly becomes a smoldering charcoal black with faint glowing embers.
signature_feature: Tail tip: flickering flame-tipped appendage with ember-scaled segments and molten gold base.
